calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Janet Gray.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leki Pese is present.
Attorney Richard Smoke representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Fleming, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated.
